message:
Usage: /gsd start <template> [description]

Templates:
  bugfix          Triage → fix → verify → ship
  small-feature   Scope → plan → implement → verify
  spike           Scope → research → synthesize
  hotfix          Fix → ship (minimal ceremony)
  refactor        Inventory → plan → migrate → verify
  security-audit  Scan → triage → remediate → re-scan
  dep-upgrade     Assess → upgrade → fix → verify
  full-project    Complete GSD with full ceremony

Examples:
  /gsd start bugfix fix login b…
Project already initialized. Use `/gsd auto` to continue or `/gsd discuss` to start a new milestone.
→ /gsd quick to begin

Usage:
  /worktree <name>        — create and switch into a new worktree
  /worktree switch <name> — switch into an existing worktree
  /worktree return        — switch back to the main project tree
  /worktree list          — list all worktrees
  /worktree merge [name] [target] — merge worktree into target branch (auto-detects when inside a worktree)
  /worktree remove <name|all> — remove a worktree (or all) and its branch
